items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Rapid7 Observed Exploitation of PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Bypass Vulne
id: 0b811003-de6b-541f-963f-8eb1e8ce85db
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-0257 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: AUTHBYPASS
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0257
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/04
modified: 2026/06/04
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-0257 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-04T18:23:49Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-0257", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-0257 Exploitation Attempt - AUTHBYPASS"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6262012; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-04, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Phishing - moderate severity (Risk 6.82/10). [ALERT] CISA KEV CONFIRMED - actively exploited in the wild. Patch immediately. EPSS 46.45% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1190, T1078, T1210 (3 techniques). 38 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: HIGH (77%) - strong data corroboration.
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_token:
        EventID:
            - 4672
            - 4673
        PrivilegeList|contains:
            - 'SeDebugPrivilege'
            - 'SeImpersonatePrivilege'
            - 'SeTcbPrivilege'
    selection_newservice:
        EventID: 4697
        ServiceName|contains: 'PSEXE'
    condition: selection_token or selection_newservice
falsepositives:
    - System administrators performing maintenance
    - Legitimate service installations
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-326: TrendAI Vision One Security Agent Time-Of-Check Time-Of-Use Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-04T18:23:49Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "ZDI-26-326: TrendAI Vision One Security Agent Time-Of-Check Time-Of-Use Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX ZDI-26-326: TrendAI Vision One Security Agent Time-Of-Check Time-Of-Use Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability Exploitation Attempt - PRIVESC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3886634; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-04, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P4] Vulnerability - low severity (Risk 0.49/10). EPSS 0.01% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1548 (1 technique). 25 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: LOW (33%) - limited source data available.
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.
